channel.title: Kida Site Hub Data Updates
channel.description: Latest generated data explainers from Kida Site Hub.

item.title: Specialized Asset Spot Prices
item.description: Specialized asset markets — collectibles, vintage instruments, graded memorabilia, and other thinly traded alternatives — are often fragmented and slow to explain themselves. This tracker turns a small set of repeatable signals into a readable market note so collectors, dealers, and analysts can understand whether price movement is being driven by liquidity, inventory, or broad demand pressure.

item.title: Simulation Game Meta Economy
item.description: Simulation game economies — from long-running MMO crafting loops to seasonal extraction titles — can shift quickly when player behavior, event rewards, or rare item demand change at the same time. This tracker explains the health of a game economy in practical terms for players, guild leaders, and creators who follow market balance.

item.title: Flight Hub Latency Logs
item.description: Flight hub delays at major connecting airports — including high-volume U.S. hubs where missed connections are costly — affect crew timing, gate congestion, baggage flow, and traveler decisions. This tracker turns hub latency signals into a readable operations note for travelers and aviation watchers.
